news.t: T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES FLOATING RATE EXCHANGE-TRADED FUND

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Floating Rate ETF (TFLR) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 624.86m in AUM and 330 holdings. TFLR is actively managed to invest in a broad portfolio of USD-denominated floating-rate loans TFLR was launched on Nov 16, 2022 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES FLOATING RATE EXCHANGE-TRADED FUND
data.text: The new fixed income ETF began trading today on NYSE Arca, Inc., and expands the firm's ETF line-up to ten active ETFs BALTIMORE , Nov. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- NEWS  T. Rowe Price (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), ...
